ksa_text: Ability to evaluate network infrastructure, system architectures, and platform capabilities, analyzing vulnerabilities and performance characteristics across interconnected systems.

Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.
Capability building for digital, data and technology

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although Technical Foundations is an edge domain for the Deputy CDO, this ability KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.466) and conceptual alignment to include at the c suite level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Technical Foundations), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.466). External reviewers may question whether this specific ability KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the Deputy CDO versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Technical foundation knowledge is validated by DCWF, NICE framework, and engineering director job postings as required for technical leadership oversight.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Overturn: while the domain is relevant, this specific ability KSA is better attributed to a more specialized adjacent role. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Initially included but overturned through adversarial review. Technical Foundations ability KSA does not meet the quality or scope threshold for the Deputy CDO after cross-framework validation.
